Description: Gotten by computing CPI data( (CPIt-CPIt-4)/CPIt-4)*100. Consumer Price Indices (CPIs, HICPs),  Consumer Price Index: All Items Non-Food Non-Energy, Quarterly, Not Seasonally Adjusted.
Link: Link example from Austria: https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/CPGRLE01ATQ659N. All countries data extracted from this same website.

Description: Monthly unemployment rate for population aged 15 and over, converted to quarterly frequency, seasonally adjusted.
Link: Link example from Austria https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/LRHUTTTTATA156S. All countries data extracted from this same website.

Description: Share of employees who are trade union members at a given point in time, annual frequency.

Description: KOF Globalisation Index, where higher values indicate greater globalisation.
Constructed by lagging the inflation variable by four quarters (one year). Values outside the 1999-2019 window are taken from adjacent periods to ensure correct measurement at the boundaries.

Variable: This is a manually constructed dataset from various datasets
